code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  mut result = "(none)"
  mut found = false
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(all)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(all, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 10
      if not found
        let line = string.substring(all, start, i)
        let trimmed = string.trim(line)
        if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
          result = trimmed
          found = true
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not found and start < n
    let line = string.substring(all, start, n)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      result = trimmed
      found = true
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
